claude.text: Good morning. You've got three things to tackle today: call the plumber, write Ana's welcome note, and finally review that cabin-trip budget—it's a couple days overdue. On the brighter side, your running streak is alive at six days, so you're in a good rhythm there. One thing to keep in the back of your mind: Sarah's birthday is coming up in four days and you haven't landed on a gift yet, so maybe start thinking about that today.

Good morning! It's Sunday, July fifth. You have three tasks on your plate today: calling the plumber, writing Ana's welcome note, and reviewing that cabin-trip budget, which is already two days overdue. On a brighter note, you're on a six-day running streak, and Sarah's birthday is coming up on Wednesday—might be a good moment today to think about a gift for her.
